description_long: This object is a modern, tactical-looking wrench with a long, cylindrical shaft and a robust, angular body. The main body is a combination of matte gray and tan colors, with a prominent handle and a stock-like rear section, suggesting ergonomic handling. The top features a black, rectangular component resembling a sight or adjustment mechanism, and the overall design is sleek with some industrial detailing. The handle appears to be textured for grip, and the shaft is straight and metallic, extending from the main body. The object is constructed primarily from metal, with some polymer or plastic elements visible in the tan areas. There are no visible signs of rust, wear, or branding, and the wrench appears to be in excellent condition.
description: A modern, tactical-style wrench with a long metallic shaft, ergonomic handle, and a black adjustment mechanism on top. The body is gray and tan, with a robust, industrial design.
description_view_0: The wrench is viewed from the front, showing the circular end of the shaft and the black adjustment mechanism aligned above the handle.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the shaft, the tan handle, the black top component, and the angular stock-like rear section.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the end of the stock and the alignment of the shaft, with the handle and adjustment mechanism visible in profile.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the shaft, handle, black top component, and the detailed rear section.
attribute_handle_grip_pattern: The handle appears to have a subtle textured or grooved pattern for improved grip.
